articles.title: Democratic socialists cemented power in New York. Next, the rest of the country? - The Washington Post
articles.description: The Democratic Socialists of America won with support outside their usual base. Winning outside New York may be a different challenge.
articles.content: A multiracial coalition of young, college-educated voters helped a group of democratic socialist candidates sweep House primaries in New York this week, giving the insurgent wing of the Democratic Pa… [+60 chars]

articles.title: 12-year-old boy rushed to hospital after shark attacks him in Bahamas, police say - Fox News
articles.description: A 12-year-old American boy is in stable condition after a shark attack while swimming off Staniel Cay in the Bahamas Exuma Cays, police reportedly said.
articles.content:
A 12-year-old American boy is in stable condition after suffering a shark attack in the Bahamas on Tuesday, the Royal Bahamas Police Force told multiple media outlets.

articles.author: Lily Alvino
articles.title: As cancer death rates plunge, clear disparities remain, new report says - NBC News
articles.description: Black and American Indian/Alaska Native communities have the highest cancer rates of any racial or ethnic group in the U.S.
articles.content: Cancer death rates in the U.S. have dropped dramatically in the past 35 years, falling by 35%, according to a report from the American Association for Cancer Research published Wednesday. The decline… [+5962 chars]
